key_drivers: Real yields rising sharply (10Y TIPS ~2.01%, up ~35bps since early March Iran war onset) — primary bearish driver for gold, silver, and rate-sensitive equities
Iran war / Strait of Hormuz blockage removing 12-15M bpd from global supply; OPEC+ symbolic hike insufficient to offset — CL remains BULLISH despite inventory build
BoJ hawkish tilt with ~50-70% April hike probability driving JPY strength (6J STRONG_BULLISH); gold ETF outflows (~$12.4B drop per SSGA April monitor) flip GC to SLIGHT_BEARISH
